data.title: Arbitrum DAO approves second RWA investment program worth $15m to increase stability
data.description:
The Arbitrum has approved the allocation of 35 million ARB for purchasing tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) for the network’s treasury. The decision is part of the decentralized autonomous organization’s (DAO’s) program to diversify its treasury holdings. The DAO’s decision launches the second version of its Stable Treasury Endowment Program (STEP). It will grow the RWA […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arbitrum-dao-rwa-investment-program-15m/

data.title: Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, presented by Gate.io, will officially open tonight, gathering top artists from around the world
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, presented by the cryptocurrency trading platform Gate.io, will officially open tonight. This music festival is an official side event of the Consensus Conference, the world's largest and most influential blockchain and encryption technology event. It is expected to attract many industry leaders, entrepreneurs and investors.
As an official side event of this year's Consensus Conference, the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival will become the highlight of the conference and provide a unique high-end exchange platform. The music festival will bring together world-renowned artists, including 3 CORNERZ led by Edison Chen, electronic music pioneer KSHMR, rock guitar musician MIYAVI, super popular girl group tripleS and new-age DJ MAO, etc., bringing a shocking audio-visual feast.
The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival aims to provide an opportunity for key figures in the global blockchain ecosystem to communicate and cooperate, and further promote the global application and innovative development of blockchain and Web3 technology. The tickets for this music festival adopt a screening registration mechanism. Music lovers can apply for tickets by clicking the "original link".
Disclaimer: This event is for entertainment and social purposes only. The content of this article does not constitute an offer, solicitation or recommendation of any product or service. Gate.io does not promote or provide any products or services in Hong Kong and other restricted regions. Please note that Gate.io may restrict or prohibit the use of all or part of its services in restricted regions.

data.title: Justin Sun: The company will launch an artificial intelligence service based on DeepSeek this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, said that the company will launch an artificial intelligence service based on DeepSeek this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: Justin Sun: AI large language model products will be launched soon and will be supported by the Tron protocol
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News TRON founder Justin Sun said today in Consensus Hong Kong 2025 that this year we will launch an AI product with long-term significance, which is a large language model based on deep learning. The product will be launched soon, and I think it will have considerable potential.
We have just completed the development of the model, which has high transparency and everyone can view the code and build on it. The model will be powered by the Tron protocol. You can get the model through stablecoin payments on the Tron network. I think this will be realized soon. I still believe that the combination of AI and blockchain will be promising.

data.title: CoinShares’ revenue in Q4 last year was £48.3 million, and its full-year revenue was £126.8 million.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset investment institution CoinShares announced its 2024 Q4 and full-year financial report. The key points are as follows:
Q4 2024:
Revenue, earnings and other income of £48.3 million (Q4 2023: £31.6 million)
Adjusted EBITDA of £33.6 million (Q4 2023: £24.5 million)
Total comprehensive income was £46.7 million (Q4 2023: £15.8 million)
Full year 2024:
Revenue, earnings and other income of £126.8m (2023: £76.3m)
Adjusted EBITDA of £109.8m (2023: £50.9m)
Total comprehensive income of £107.5m (2023: £38.4m)
The CoinShares asset management division had the strongest performance during the quarter, with the physical platform achieving significant growth in Q4. Among them, physical Ethereum ETPs led the way with $75 million in inflows, while physical XRP ETPs attracted $31 million in new investment.
Total assets on the CoinShares physical platform grew 54% to $2.3 billion, with the physical Bitcoin ETP becoming the largest in Europe. Despite outflows from the XBT platform, strong gains in cryptocurrency prices pushed AUM up 30% to $3.74 billion.
In the U.S., its CoinShares-Valkyrie business line saw $19 million in net inflows, with WGMI leading with $52 million in inflows, while the U.S. market saw $16 billion in inflows into crypto spot, futures and equity ETPs. The asset management division had revenue of £25.3 million for the quarter and £87.1 million for the full year 2024.

data.title: Base will increase the gas target to 26 Mgas/s
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Base developer @wbnns posted on X that Base plans to increase the gas target to 26 Mgas/s on Wednesday. As more and more people use Base, this will help keep fees low.

data.title: Gm Capital team member: Meteora earned over $300 million last month, and earned $40 million in fees on the day Libra was launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gm Capital team member Beanie Yu X said in a post: "The craziest thing I learned in the past few days is that Meteora is sniping its own tokens. I didn't release this news before. Because it's almost unbelievable. Because the platform's revenue exceeded $300 million last month, and Libra alone earned $40 million from fees on the day of its launch. But this is what is happening.
If the Libra sniper mentioned by Hayden (Libra initiator) succeeded in obtaining a position commitment size of $57 million in the first millisecond, then I am not surprised at all that he is actually Meteora betraying and reverse trading Kelsier. Nothing is incredible. It seems that no relationship is sacred.
If this is true, then Kelsier is just a pawn. This makes sense. For example, why let Kelsier (who doesn't seem to be very smart in all aspects) make hundreds of millions or even billions of dollars? Kelsier may just be a useful idiot here, serving the big bosses behind the scenes."

data.title: Upbit will support Function X (FX) rebranding to Pundi AI (PUNDIAI) and related token swaps
data.description: According to the official announcement, Upbit announced that it will support the renaming of Function X (FX) to Pundi AI (PUNDIAI) and related token swaps. The token deposit and withdrawal services will be suspended at 11:00 (KST) on February 26, 2025. After completing the brand reshaping and token swap and confirming the system stability, deposits and withdrawals will be resumed.
